description: Letter addressed to a cantor (סידי אלחזאן היקר) consisting entirely of instructions about calendrical reckoning related to the current year 4838 AM = 1077/78 CE. On verso there appears the name of the ḥaver Saʿdaya b. Yisraʾel the cantor.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בHUC.
